title: Outlined Valuables
description: Adds borders to all ores, gilded blackstone, suspicious sand/gravel and budding amethyst for better visibility
body:
# **Collect them all & Save the rest**

**You’ll never miss a valuable block or accidentally mine one again thanks to a simple little border**

![All affected blocks on a wall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23024199de605a254e8da063588b9cedf531d62d.png)

This adds colored borders around **_all ores_** in both the Overworld and the Nether, aswell as **_suspicious sand_**, **_suspicious gravel_**, **_gilded blackstone_** and **_budding amethyst_** blocks

All borders use the existing colors of their vanilla counterparts with a few slight shade adjustments to improve visibility in darker areas like the Nether or the deepslate y levels
